articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
articles.description: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal
articles.description: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

images.name: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal
images.caption: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Ralph Priso (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Nicolás Samayoa (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Canada 0, Guatemala 0.
Substitution, Guatemala. Damián Rivera replaces Rudy Muñoz.
Substitution, Guatemala. Kevin Ramírez replaces Jonathan Franco.
Substitution, Guatemala. Matt Evans replaces Óscar Santis.
Substitution, Guatemala. José Rosales replaces Marvin Ávila.
Second Half begins Canada 0, Guatemala 0.
Substitution, Canada. Tiago Coimbra replaces Rayan Elloumi.
Substitution, Canada. Jeevan Badwal replaces Jonathan Osorio.
Substitution, Canada. Malik Henry replaces Shola Jimoh.
Goal! Canada 1, Guatemala 0. Jacen Russell-Rowe (Canada) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Malik Henry with a cross.
Substitution, Canada. Noah Abatneh replaces Ralph Priso.
Substitution, Canada. Jahkeele Marshall-Rutty replaces Zorhan Bassong.
Substitution, Guatemala. Jefry Bantes replaces Darwin Lom.
José Rosales (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Canada. Luka Gavran replaces James Pantemis.
Substitution, Canada. Marius Aiyenero replaces Jayden Nelson.
Substitution, Canada. Matteo de Brienne replaces Richie Laryea.
Matteo de Brienne (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Canada 1, Guatemala 0.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
Foul by Óscar Santis (Guatemala).
Jonathan Osorio (Canada) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Guatemala. Óscar Santis is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Zorhan Bassong (Canada) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Mathieu Choinière.

play.text: Attempt missed. Zorhan Bassong (Canada) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Mathieu Choinière.

commentary.text: Foul by Mathieu Choinière (Canada).
Óscar Santis (Guatemala) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Shola Jimoh (Canada).
José Morales (Guatemala) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Jayden Nelson (Canada).
Óscar Castellanos (Guatemala) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Jonathan Franco (Guatemala).
Mathieu Choinière (Canada) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Corner, Canada. Conceded by José Ardón.
Foul by Richie Laryea (Canada).
Rudy Muñoz (Guatemala) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Darwin Lom (Guatemala).
Kamal Miller (Canada) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Rayan Elloumi (Canada) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Jayden Nelson.
Attempt saved. Óscar Santis (Guatemala) right footed shot from more than 40 yards on the right wing is saved in the bottom right corner by James Pantemis (Canada). Assisted by Óscar Castellanos.

play.text: Óscar Santis (Guatemala) Shot On Target at 19'

commentary.text: Foul by José Morales (Guatemala).
Richie Laryea (Canada) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match because of an injury Marvin Ávila (Guatemala).
Ralph Priso (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

play.text: Ralph Priso (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

commentary.text: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Darwin Lom (Guatemala) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Kamal Miller (Canada).
Foul by Zorhan Bassong (Canada).
Óscar Santis (Guatemala) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Corner, Guatemala. Conceded by Jonathan Osorio.
Attempt saved. Marvin Ávila (Guatemala) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is saved in the centre of the goal by James Pantemis (Canada).

play.text: Marvin Ávila (Guatemala) Shot On Target at 25'

commentary.text: Corner, Guatemala. Conceded by James Pantemis.
Foul by Nicolás Samayoa (Guatemala).
Shola Jimoh (Canada) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Nicolás Samayoa (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

play.text: Nicolás Samayoa (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

commentary.text: Offside, Guatemala. Darwin Lom is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Jacen Russell-Rowe (Canada) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Kénderson Navarro (Guatemala). Assisted by Jayden Nelson.

play.text: Jacen Russell-Rowe (Canada) Shot On Target at 28'

commentary.text: Corner, Canada. Conceded by Kénderson Navarro.
Foul by Darwin Lom (Guatemala).
Mathieu Choinière (Canada) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Mathieu Choinière (Canada) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Kénderson Navarro (Guatemala).
